---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Evidence synthesis methods, applied to clinical AI."
description: "Study teardowns, framework drafts, case-study companions."
page-layout: article
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "2*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    categories: "Tags"
  feed:
    title: "Paulina Del Mundo — Writing"
    description: "Evidence synthesis methods, applied to clinical AI."
    items: 20
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 25
---
